title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 545.570 - In case of removal, transcript of record to be made
text:
545.570.  In case of removal, transcript of record to be made. — Whenever any order shall be made for the removal of any cause, under the foregoing provisions, the clerk of the court in which the same is pending shall make out a full transcript of the record and proceedings in the cause, including the order of removal, the petition therefor, if any, and the recognizance of the defendant and of all witnesses, and shall transmit the same, duly certified under the seal of the court, to the clerk of the court to which the removal is ordered.
(RSMo 1939 § 4029) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3640; 1919 § 3983; 1909 § 5190
